433.issue_title: Feature: Structurally aware append in safe_edit_file

cycles.name: C_SCHEMA.1

deliverables.description: Define IAtomicFileWriter protocol interface in core/interfaces/file_writer.py
Refactor SafeEditInput with 4-operation Pydantic models (extra='forbid') in tools/safe_edit_tool.py

cycles.exit_criteria: IAtomicFileWriter protocol defined; AtomicFileWriter implemented; ReplaceOp, AppendOp, RewriteOp, PatternReplaceOp, and SafeEditInput parse correctly and reject extra fields.

cycles.name: C_EXECUTE.2

deliverables.description: Implement pure CQS query transformer _generate_new_content handling replace, append, rewrite, pattern_replace
Enforce must_exist=True governance check rejecting non-existent target files with scaffold_artifact referral
Integrate difflib fuzzy matching in _find_fuzzy_matches for target mismatch diagnostics
Inject IAtomicFileWriter into SafeEditTool and perform atomic temp-swap writes under asyncio.Lock

cycles.exit_criteria: All 4 operations execute cleanly; non-existent files rejected with governance error; difflib returns near-match suggestions on target mismatch; writes use atomic temp-swap under lock.

cycles.name: C_INTEGRATION.3

deliverables.description: Update unit tests in test_safe_edit_tool.py for all 4 operations, governance, fuzzy match, and atomic writing
Update schema tests in test_extra_forbid.py for extra='forbid' on all 4 operation models
Refactor validation integration tests in test_safe_edit_validation_integration.py
Perform explicit hard-removal of all legacy line_edits and insert_lines test methods across all test files

cycles.exit_criteria: 100% test pass rate across all unit and integration suites; all legacy line_edits and insert_lines test methods hard-removed; 0 typing errors; Pylint score 10.00/10.
